expected_headers: What is your job title / field of study?
Are you applying solo or with a team? Each team member has to register separately.
Team name (if applying with a team)
Brief description of your relevant experience (projects, hackathons, work)
Have you used OpenAI tools before (API, Codex, ChatGPT for building)?
How did you hear about this event?
I consent to the processing of my personal data by START Warsaw for the purpose of organizing this event, in accordance with GDPR.
I consent to sharing my data (name, email) with OpenAI for purposes related to the hackathon and their programs
I consent to sharing my credentials and achievements with case partners for recruitment purposes
I consent to the use of my image (photos/video) from the event in START Warsaw and OpenAI promotional materials
I'd like to receive the START Warsaw newsletter and updates on future events
